content.rendered:
Make your Easter holiday package vacation spectacular, Visit the Masai Mara, Amboseli, Tsavo, Samburu, Lake Nakuru, Naivasha, Mombasa, Malindi, and Nairobi National Park with best vacation packages. Book with us to unwind with family and friends while enjoying a budget-friendly Easter safari. Easter holiday packages from Royal star Expeditions are affordable ways to celebrate the season.

Below are our Easter Holiday Packages:

1 DAY TSAVO EAST NATIONAL PARK SAFARI – KENYA SAFARI

Pick up from your hotel at dawn. As day breaks, drive along Mombasa-Nairobi Highway to Tsavo East National Park through the Bachuma gate game en-route Via Aruba dam.

1 DAY MALINDI DAY TOUR (MINIMUM 2 PAX)

Green turtles, unique coral gardens, the Gede Ruins – the Watamu Marine National Park & Reserve has it all. The park is part of a complex of marine and tidal habitats along the Kenya’s north.

3 DAYS WILD TOUR QUEEN ELIZABETH NATIONAL PARK SAFARI UGANDA

We invite you for this 3 Days Uganda Tour, it takes you to Queen Elizabeth National Park, home to 95 and plus species of mammals and over 500 species of birds.

MOMBASA 2023 PACKAGES

The gateway to the coast of Kenya, Mombasa is one of the best travel destinations in Kenya.

3 DAYS MASAI MARA SAFARI PACKAGES

The Great Wildebeest Migration, is one of the “Seven New Wonders of the World”. No where in the world.

3 DAY AMBOSELI SAFARI

This 3 day safari takes you through Southern Kenya towards the Amboseli National Park, which lies in the shadows of Mount Kilimanjaro.

3 DAYS TSAVO EAST WEST SAFARI TOUR EXPLORATION

3 Days-Tsavo-East-West safari tour is our ultimate game adventure from Mombasa back to Mombasa by road.

A DAY TRIP TO SHIMBA HILLS NATIONAL RESERVE

A coastal rain forest in Kenya? Anything is possible here! Visit Shimba Hills to experience cool sea breezes

1 DAY NAIROBI NATIONAL PARK TOUR

Nairobi National Park Tour – 1 Day Nairobi National Park Tour – Kenya, ½-Day Nairobi National Park Half-Day Tour,

Discover amazing places at exclusive easter holiday package deals! With vacation packages to Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania, and Zanzibar, Royal Star Expeditions stands out as one of the most reputable indigenously owned Tours & Safari Companies in Kenya. It is a fully licensed safari and tour operator based in Nairobi, Kenya, with its headquarters there.
